label: sleep
groundingNote: something of one kind happens to someone's body for some time: the body does not move; this someone cannot see, cannot hear many things, does not know what happens in the place where the body is; it happens to all people at some times: people want it after they do many things for a long time
notes: NSM-adjacent universal bodily state. Grounds night/bed/dream/wake/nap transitively.
